programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A wounded military commander deploys his trained double, "Shadow," to deceive the court and rival forces, as a volatile king plots a secret attack to seize a strategic city. Deception and warfare collide in a decisive battle for power.

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 92
programme.desc: Helmed by the ever-popular veteran show host He Jiong, this all-new variety show features celebrity artistes from China, Hong Kong and Taiwan participating in song and dance performances, games and more.

programme.title: The Blooming Journey 2 - EP 10
programme.desc: A heartfelt travelogue where five iconic actresses and two charismatic Gen Z brothers embark on a blooming journey of courage and connection. From mountains to markets, join them as they rediscover happiness, culture, and the joy of blooming together through life's adventures.

programme.title: Gone with the Rain - EP 22
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Gone with the Rain - EP 23

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 68
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. programme.title: Evilive - EP 7

programme.title: Hello Mr. Billionaire
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A windfall from the sky! A down-and-out goalkeeper suddenly inherits a massive fortune, but to claim it, he must spend one billion within a month. What follows is a money-burning challenge filled with chaos, comedy, and endless laughs, where spending money becomes the hardest task of all.

programme.title: BARAYA URANG PASUNDAN - EP 61
programme.desc: Semi-documentary that explores a region of West Java lived by Sundanese

programme.title: Petaka Akibat Sumpah Ibu
programme.desc: Bu Imah, struggling in the strong river current, shouts at Dani that his life will never be peaceful because he has harmed his own child and mother. Dani ignores her and leaves with satisfaction. However, fate has other plans. On his way home, a lightning-struck tree falls on him, leaving him unconscious and in a coma.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 44
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: AKSI ASIA 2024 - EP 25
programme.desc: 24 ustaz and ustazah from 6 Asian countries-Brunei Darussalam, Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, Thailand, and Timor Leste-take the stage to compete, showcasing a variety of meaningful Islamic activities and entertainment. Watch them da’wah together with commentators: Ust. Subki, Ust. Solmed, Ust. Wijayanto, and Mamah Dedeh, hosted by the trusted MC of AKSI ASIA 2024.

programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: Ketemu di Mimpi is Level 34 of Kangen
programme.desc: Saskia (Saskia Chadwick) baru saja putus dengan pacarnya, lalu temannya menyarankan untuk ikut open trip wisata. Ia bertemu dengan Yudha (Rizki Nazar) yang mengaku sebagai leader open trip tersebut. Saskia dan Yudha pun bersama menatap bintang di tengah hutan pada malam hari. Saskia pun syok saat bangun di rumah sakit karena pingsan dan pihak travel tidak ada yang mengenal Yudha. Mungkinkah Yudha hanyalah imajinasi dari rasa trauma Saskia saja?

programme.title: Bintang Jatuh Menjemput Taubat
programme.desc: Roy is a rich kid who can do anything he wants. However, due to his actions, his parents go bankrupt. What will make Roy repent?

programme.title: Pesona 34-ku Bakalan Badabest Meluluhkan Hatimu
programme.desc: Pada suatu hari, Surya (Bastian Steel) tanpa sengaja akan menabrak motor yang dikendarai oleh Citra (Sitha Marino) dan temannya. Citra marah dan terlibat percekcokan dengan Surya yang mengendarai mobil dengan terburu-buru dan ngebut.

programme.title: Hidup Kembali Menjelang Taubat
programme.desc: Darma (Kevin Kambey), a specialist burglar targeting rich houses, cruelly abandons his heavily pregnant wife for his mistress.

programme.title: POV Disekop-Sekop Cogan 34 M Followers
programme.desc: During a fight with El (Cinta Brian), Echa (Zoe Abbas Jackson) accidentally injures Tristan (Kevin Hillers) until he loses consciousness. Panicking, Echa and El think Tristan has died. Echa wants to report to the police, but El insists no one will believe it was an accident. They plan to dispose of the body, but Tristan suddenly regains consciousness. Instead of being angry, he is happy-he was bored with his routine life and had long wanted a vacation.

programme.title: Aura 34 Babe Angels Bikin Hati Semrawut
programme.desc: Mayang (Emilia Samma) berinsiatif untuk menyewa Juleha (Larasati Nugroho) sebagai bodyguard Kevin (Mahdy Reza) setelah Kevin diserang oleh sekelompok pria, tapi Kevin menolaknya mentah-mentah. Menurut Kevin, jika Juleha menjadi bodyguard-nya, apakah hidupnya akan sengsara. Lagi pula baginya, tidak mungkin seorang perempuan menjadi bodyguard. Bagaimana kisah selanjutnya?

programme.title: RESEP MAKNYUS ALA CHEF SYANTIK
programme.desc: Mega, a sales promotion girl at the mall, almost bumped into Dhika, who had just dropped off Cinta, his first love, from shopping. Mega quickly apologized and asked her friend for permission to chase after her cousin, who had run away with her boyfriend to Bandung. She received news that Mega, a sales promotion girl at the mall, almost bumped into Dhika, who had just dropped off Cinta, his first love, from shopping.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 130
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cintamu Pedas Bikin Aku Shock, Kamunya Malah Shick Shack Shock
programme.desc: Laras (Soraya Rasyid) is a farmer who takes care of spicy chilies on a daily basis. This is because Laras' family is engaged in chili farming and Laras, who grew up there, really likes spicy. Suddenly Laras's ordinary life, the arrival of a handsome guy named Ryan (Kiki Farrel). But Ryan doesn't like spicy and strangely he insists that he really likes Laras.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 584
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 78
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: RAYUAN PEDAS NONA CABE
programme.desc: Since his mother died, Marvin has been living with Agus, his father, and his new brother, Ramon. Since childhood, Marvin has hated Ramon because he always received gifts from Agus while Marvin received punishments, and he never considered Ramon his brother. Eleven years later, Ramon was doing community service at a chili plantation, and one of the farmers was Desi.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 130
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day when Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend Rangga (Joshua Otay) with another woman. Dania was shocked because she did not expect her boyfriend to have an affair with another woman behind her back. After that, Dania brooded alone in a park. She said she wished someone would give her a hug when she was vulnerable like that.

programme.title: ROMANSA PASUTRI MAGANG
programme.desc: Gladys and Junas suddenly got married just because they had to replace their older siblings.

programme.title: Hatiku Ganjil Jika Tidak Genap Mencintaimu
programme.desc: Della (Rayna Snova) is constantly urged by her mother to get married, but she is not ready to open her heart after breaking up with Bram (Kevin Hillers). Bram still loves Della, yet Della starts dating Mario, Bram’s coworker who works as a bakery chef. Will Della and Bram reunite?

programme.desc: Kayla's (Shanice Margaretha) supply of ice cubes melts when her mom cuts the power, leaving Kayla in a quandary. Finally, Kayla goes to a refrigerator in the cafe and without permission puts in her ice cubes.

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cintamu Pedas Bikin Aku Shock, Kamunya Malah Shick Shack Shock
programme.desc: Laras (Soraya Rasyid) is a farmer who takes care of spicy chilies on a daily basis. This is because Laras' family is engaged in chili farming and Laras, who grew up there, really likes spicy. Suddenly Laras's ordinary life, the arrival of a handsome guy named Ryan (Kiki Farrel). But Ryan doesn't like spicy and strangely he insists that he really likes Laras.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 585
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: RAYUAN PEDAS NONA CABE
programme.desc: Since his mother died, Marvin has been living with Agus, his father, and his new brother, Ramon. Since childhood, Marvin has hated Ramon because he always received gifts from Agus while Marvin received punishments, and he never considered Ramon his brother. Eleven years later, Ramon was doing community service at a chili plantation, and one of the farmers was Desi.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 80
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Lu Bijak Sama Gua Sekarang Neng Basreng
programme.desc: The tight schedule of being a famous artist made Tama exhausted while driving so Tama crashed into a basreng vendor. With her kindness even though she was upset Aina (Shanice Margaretha) took Tama (Lavicky Nicholas) to the hospital. After realizing, Tama was surprised why he was in the hospital with an unknown woman. Tama asked Aina not to publicize this case. Suddenly reporters came and asked who Aina was, Tama spontaneously claimed that Aina was his girlfriend.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 132
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: 4x4=16, Aku Bilang Cinta Hayo Dibalas
programme.desc: Mei (Jennifer Eve) in her daily life works as an assistant director, she must accompany a director to hunt for filming locations. Then at that time, Mei was upset, because her love was unrequited, namely because the guy she loved was going to marry another girl.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 586

programme.title: Tikus dan Kucing - EP 4
programme.desc: Menceritakan kisah cinta Mitha dan Jaenal yang tidak mendapat restu ibu bapa masing-masing, kerana ibu bapa mereka sering bertengkar, dan saling membenci.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 16

programme.title: Puncline DAC - EP 4
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Kiah The Spy - EP 7

programme.title: NoYa - EP 3

programme.title: 3 Gadis Manis - EP 1

programme.desc: Kisah tentang dua remaja, Amy dan Tasya yang menjadi mangsa kerakusan kekejaman manusia berhati binatang.

programme.title: Halal Maps - EP 12

programme.title: Nikah, Cerai, Rujuk - EP 24

programme.title: 3 Gadis Manis - EP 2

programme.title: Dee The Series - EP 4

programme.title: Karok La Kau! - EP 8

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 7

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 8

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 9

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 10

programme.title: Valimai
programme.desc: A ruthless bike gang terrorizes the city and shatters order, until fearless cop Arjun rises against crime, risking his life to restore justice and bring back peace.

programme.title: Badal
programme.desc: Badal watches his family die in riots and is raised by a terrorist, growing into a weapon of revenge as he hunts the police officer responsible for his tragic loss. Release Year: 2000 Director: Raj Kanwar

programme.title: Gangaajal
programme.desc: IPS Amit Kumar is posted to a lawless town and battles corrupt cops and brutal criminals, standing firm against danger to restore justice and order. Release Year: 2003 Director: Prakash Jha Awards: Best Screenplay Prakash Jha

programme.title: Chor Machaye Shor
programme.desc: A clever thief disguises himself as a cop to recover his stolen diamond from police headquarters, gaining the ACP's trust while a sharp colleague grows suspicious of him. Release Year: 2002 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Aakhree Raasta
programme.desc: Released from prison after 24 years for a crime he did not commit, David discovers that the people who framed him are now prominent citizens. Release Year: 1986 Director: Bhagyaraj

programme.title: Double Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four lazy friends dream of real estate riches but are cheated by Kabir, pushing them to chase him down and reclaim their lost pride and money. Release Year: 2011 Director: Indra Kumar Awards: 2012 Winner Popular Award- Best Comic Actor- Riteish Deshmukh

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a fearless yet reckless cop, angers a corrupt politician by killing his brother, leading to brutal revenge that drives him into a fight for justice. Release Year: 2012 Director: Arbaaz Khan Awards: 2013 Winner Popular Award for Best Actor - Salman Khan

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Haunted by a village curse predicting her husband's death in thirteen days, a newlywed bride seeks a ghost hunter's help to save the man she loves desperately tonight. Release Year: 2024 Director: Aditya Sarpotdar

programme.title: Agent Vinod
programme.desc: RAW agent Vinod travels across nations to learn who killed Rajan and why a nuclear suitcase sparked chaos, exposing a global conspiracy that ends in London. Release Year: 2012 Director: Sriram Raghavan

programme.title: Forensic
programme.desc: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds. Release Year: 2022 Director: Vishal Furia

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a fearless yet reckless cop, angers a corrupt politician by killing his brother, leading to brutal revenge that drives him into a fight for justice. Release Year: 2012 Director: Arbaaz Khan Awards: 2013 Winner Popular Award for Best Actor - Salman Khan

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Haunted by a village curse predicting her husband's death in thirteen days, a newlywed bride seeks a ghost hunter's help to save the man she loves desperately tonight. Release Year: 2024 Director: Aditya Sarpotdar

programme.title: Waqt: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: Patriarch Ishwar Chandra Thakur's peaceful life shatters when his lazy son Adiya marries an enemy's daughter, forcing Ishwar to teach him hard lessons about struggle and survival. Release Year: 2005 Director: Yash Chopra

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: Karamveer gains fame by posing as a woman on a call centre job, but obsessive callers turn his secret into chaos, dragging him into trouble that threatens his real identity. Release Year: 2019 Director: Raaj Shaandilyaa

programme.title: Ghayal
programme.desc: Framed for his brother's murder by Balwant Rai, Ajay survives prison with three allies, planning a daring revenge that will expose the truth and bring down the powerful villain. Release Year: 1990 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: Best Film: Dharamendra, Best Actor: Sunny Deol, Best Director: Rajkumar Santoshi, Best Story Writer: Rajkumar Santoshi, Best Editor Filmfare Awards

programme.title: No Entry
programme.desc: A loyal friend helps a victim escape a cruel marriage by introducing her to a dancer, setting off a chain of comic misunderstandings, emotional twists, and surprising revelations. Release Year: 2005 Director: Anees Bazmee Awards: 2006 Nominee Filmfare Award Best Film

programme.title: Chor Machaye Shor
programme.desc: A clever thief disguises himself as a cop to recover his stolen diamond from police headquarters, gaining the ACP's trust while a sharp colleague grows suspicious of him. Release Year: 2002 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: 12th Fail
programme.desc: IPS officer Manoj Kumar Sharma embarks on a fearless journey to restart his academic pursuit, aiming to conquer the world's toughest competitive exam.

programme.title: Zara Hatke Zara Bachke
programme.desc: Kapil and Somya are a happily married couple who live in a joint family and decide to get a divorce. Things don't go as planned as their family gets to know of it, and thus begins a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Warning 2
programme.desc: Geja fails to assassinate Pamma and ends up in the same jail, where he's intent on finishing the job. A merciless cop's plan to transfer the dangerous prisoners escalates the situation.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Dor
programme.desc: Zeenat's husband accidentally kills a man in Saudi Arabia and the only way to save him from death is to obtain forgiveness from the widow of the deceased.

programme.title: Parampara
programme.desc: The grandchildren of two sworn enemies want to put the bitterness between the families behind them, but will the bloodthirsty traditions compel them to do otherwise?

programme.title: Thugs Of Hindostan
programme.desc: A story about one man's love for his nation and another's love for power. An epic adventure filled with edge-of-the-seat thrills and war on the seas.

programme.title: Jalsa
programme.desc: It tells the story of a celebrated journalist and her cook and their conflict.

programme.desc: A man falls head over heels in love with a woman and takes on a new identity in an attempt to impress her. Along the way, he also seeks the help of her dog to try and win her over.

programme.title: Ne Me Liberez Pas, Je M'en Charge
programme.desc: A former hold-up man, Michel Vaujour has spent 27 years behind bars, 17 of them in solitary confinement. Longing for freedom, he has made five spectacular escapes. While this tumultuous lifestyle has often exposed him to the worst situations, it has also put him face to face with himself...

programme.title: En Voiture Clara
programme.desc: Clara is 17 years old today. As part of a surprise and to create a diversion, her father, Gilles, takes her to a deserted parking lot for a driving lesson. Nothing will go as planned.

programme.title: Elles - EP 3
programme.desc: Once synonymous with macho behaviour, Spain is today at the forefront of the feminist struggle. Sarahmee plays pelota with the women of the Ados Pilota group, participates in a street performance Abya Yala's artists and meets the urban planners of Punt 6, who adapt public areas for vulnerable people.

programme.title: Elles - EP 5
programme.desc: In San Francisco, the counterculture capital, Sarahmee goes surfing with the Brown Girl Surf group, which aims to make the sport accessible to people of colour. She tries skateboarding with Skate Like a Girl and graffiti with the women of Graffiti Camp for Girls.

programme.title: Femmes De Science - EP 7
programme.desc: Physicist, Berengere Dubrulle is a member of the Academy of Sciences, research director at CNRS, at the Laboratory for the Physics of Condensed Matter (SPEC/CEA, CNRS) and at the ecole de Physique des Houches (CEA, CNRS, ENS de Lyon, Universite Grenoble-Alpes).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Sages & Rebelles
programme.desc: In Quebec, despite rapidly-increasing demand and the profession now having been legal for some twenty years, access to the services of a midwife remains limited. Claudie Simard discovers the little-known everyday life of these health professionals and looks into the options for giving birth offered to Quebec's women.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 5
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde explores the decor trends of the Lyon metropolis before heading to the Atlantic coast, in Charente-Maritime, to discover its charms.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 6
programme.desc: Eric Desbois, a farmer in Eure, opened a campsite on a plot of the family farm. Over the years, he has turned it into a nature-oriented place, with a choice to plant numerous species and use eco-friendly management methods.

programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 1
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 2
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Bestioles En Questions - EP 26
programme.desc: As a nature enthusiast, emilie is very interested in the behaviour of insects and other small creatures. What do ants eat? Why are frogs slimy? Can a tortoise catch a cold? No question goes unasked!

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 31
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 17
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: La Clef - C'est Quoi Ton Truc Julie ? - EP 2
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 19
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 20
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 24
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 5
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 15
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 1
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Ma Vie Avec L'ia - EP 7
programme.desc: Theo, a teenager, questions artificial intelligence directly to try to understand it better. He wants to know what it is made of, what feeds it, and how it analyzes data.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo - EP 22
programme.desc: The prostitution of underage girls is on the rise: pedocriminality is facilitated by social networks and the inertia of the public authorities. Why do teenage girls fall into prostitution? How can we protect them? Are young men also affected by this scourge?

programme.title: Ding Dong : Montre-Moi Ta Maison ! - EP 11
programme.desc: We visit a former woollen mill converted into a loft, where two artists live and express their creativity. Mirjam and Werner Koller's house has been adapted to suit their passion: dogs!

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera - EP 81
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 13
programme.desc: Young Iranian activist, Mahdie Alinejad's life changes in a week. To escape the police, she flees clandestinely to Switzerland, where she realizes she has escaped the worst. In Geneva, she becomes a sports coach thanks to an association and commits to the cause of Iranian women.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 78
programme.desc: Heading to Saint-Tropez, in the Var region, for the Voiles de Saint-Tropez, an event that brings together over 250 boats this year. And to tell us more, Loick Peyron, one of the most renowned French sailors.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Papilles - EP 21
programme.desc: Taittinger and Auguste Escoffier Prize, Meilleur Ouvrier de France, Bocuse d'Or... Michel Roth boasts a unique record of achievements. After meeting him first in Moselle, this time we head to Geneva, where he runs prestigious kitchens. With him, discover an epicurean and little-known Switzerland.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Refuges De Montagne - Hiver - EP 2
programme.desc: It's time to welcome the first customers at the Lobhorn, but the water supply's frozen! Ursula and Ruedi Schranz are preparing to work at the Coaz refuge. At the Trift, the Naue family install a temporary roof to save their season. At the Brunni, Irene and Livia Cotting are worried.

programme.title: Bijoux : Eclats De Reves - EP 3
programme.desc: Between craftsmanship and industry, a look at today's jewellery-making methods in France.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 21
programme.desc: Gabor and Rahel, founders of Ulgador and designers of gilded decorative items, join forces and expertise with Aude Taon, textile designer. An in-depth look at an emblematic Hermes creation, the Birkin bag. Behind the scenes of French linen production. The star of colour combinations: how to wear black and white.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 23
programme.desc: The Camille Claudel Museum includes works by artists from Nogent. Notebooks, coloured pencils and an overflowing imagination - that's the recipe of illustrator Pierre-Emmanuel Lyet. The models in the Kidsuper catwalk show live in a limitless imaginary world. Laetitia Baque and Victor Molinie are redrawing the contours of contemporary embroidery.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 11
programme.desc: On the menu: curry haricot bean dip, duqqa with pistachio and almonds, hibiscus and curry-flavoured salt, mini homemade merguez sausages.

programme.title: Parlons Eco - EP 5
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Taratata 100% Live - EP 2
programme.desc: With Mika, -M-, Thibault Cauvin, Ayo, Gringe, Olivia Ruiz, Solann, Jon Muq

programme.title: L'art Du Crime - EP 2
programme.desc: Deep in the Paris catacombs, a young woman dressed as a vampire is found murdered in a coffin, a stake driven through her heart. Verlay and Chassagne take a close interest in the theatre troupe the victim used to perform with. But feelings become involved and complicate the investigation.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 21
programme.desc: Gabor and Rahel, founders of Ulgador and designers of gilded decorative items, join forces and expertise with Aude Taon, textile designer. programme.title: Yetili - EP 3

programme.title: Yetili - EP 4
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Bestioles En Questions - EP 27
programme.desc: As a nature enthusiast, emilie is very interested in the behaviour of insects and other small creatures. What do ants eat? Why are frogs slimy? Can a tortoise catch a cold? No question goes unasked!

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 32
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 18
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: La Clef - C'est Quoi Ton Truc Julie ? - EP 3
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 21
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 22
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 25
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 6
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 16
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 2
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: A Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada

programme.title: Vivement Dimanche

programme.title: Echappees Belles - EP 17
programme.desc: Cyprus offers a total change of scenery! To truly experience it, one must travel from east to west along the coast, visit ancient castles, monasteries, flower-filled villages, mountain resorts, forests... With its superb beaches and rich cultural heritage, there is something for everyone.

programme.title: Femmes De Science - EP 8
programme.desc: Mathematician Laure Saint-Raymond is a member of the Academy of Sciences, professor at the Institute for Advanced Scientific Studies and at the ecole Normale Superieure of Lyon.

programme.title: Femmes De Science - EP 9

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone - EP 21

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Un Dimanche A La Campagne - EP 4
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. In a house open to surprises and the unexpected, between emotion and laughter, each reveals the invisible thread of their personal story...

programme.title: Jumping International De Bordeaux 2026 - Grand Prix Longines
programme.desc: From 5 to 8 February, equestrian enthusiasts were in Bordeaux for the Jumping International 2026. For the first time, the three major Olympic disciplines-show jumping, eventing and dressage-were brought together alongside four-in-hand driving. A look back at the highlights of the Longines Grand Prix.

programme.title: Movie - Kannu Pada Pokuthaiya

programme.title: Movie - Aanazhagan
programme.desc: Raja pretends to be a married woman in order to get a house for rent for his friends. However, things change after he falls for the landlady's daughter.

programme.title: Movie - Rathna
programme.desc: Rathnavelu and Muthuvelu are twin brothers who get separated at birth when their parents are killed by an evil man. Rathnavelu grows up and decides to take revenge on the man who killed his parents.

programme.desc: Annadurai, an ordinary school teacher, turns into a Good Samaritan and runs an orphanage after a tragic incident. However, his actions are closely watched by ACP Easwara Pandian and his team.

programme.title: Movie - Demonte Colony
programme.desc: After consuming liquor, four friends decide to do something interesting and visit a haunted bungalow. However, they do not realise that they have returned home with an evil spirit.

programme.title: Movie - Thondan
programme.desc: Jeeva, an uneducated driver, cannot tolerate child labour and fights to eliminate it. When Subha witnesses a murder and is in danger, Jeeva comes to her rescue.

programme.title: Movie - Chinnamani
programme.desc: For years, Duraisamy Thevar's mother has tried to force him to get married, but he does not listen. Finally, when he decides to marry Chinna Mani, a widow, his family is shocked as she is supposedly unlucky.

programme.title: FANZONE - FRI 13 MAR (Live)
programme.desc: This is the show that puts international fans at the heart of the Premier League conversation. We connect with fans from around the world as they share their views on their teams and favourite players.

programme.title: PREVIEW - FRI 13 MAR
programme.desc: A tightly packed look-ahead to the forthcoming matchround with a mix of player interviews and special features.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND - FRI 13 MAR
programme.desc: Light-hearted, inclusive and entertaining, Welcome to the Weekend is the show that kicks off the Premier League weekend. We will focus on the football but also on the lifestyle topics that footballers and fans love - food, fashion, music, movies and much, much more.

programme.title: TEAM TALKS - FRI 13 MAR (Live)
programme.desc: Punditry, pressers and predictions ahead of the PL weekend. Our studio team tackle all the major talking points and we hear from the headline acts as the players and the managers have their say ahead of the action.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW - FRI 13 MAR
programme.desc: Haaland or Salah? Saka or Palmer? Isak or Cunha? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy, but the Fantasy Show is on hand to help FPL Managers with those big decisions.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 31
programme.desc: This week, The Big Interview sits down with Newcastle United's Malick Thiaw to discuss his journey to the Premier League. Growing up in Dusseldorf within a multicultural family, the German International reflects on his early life and the role models that shaped him. Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 41
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe's most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 - EP 17
programme.desc: Liverpool and Spain star Luis Garcia selects his ultimate Premier League eleven, choosing from the best players he played alongside in England. Drawing on his experiences at Anfield and on the international stage, Garcia reflects on the talent, skill, and personalities that made his list. With insight, anecdotes and tough decisions, he builds his dream team from his unforgettable years in the Premier League.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 31
programme.desc: This week, The Big Interview sits down with Newcastle United's Malick Thiaw to discuss his journey to the Premier League. Growing up in Dusseldorf within a multicultural family, the German International reflects on his early life and the role models that shaped him. Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.desc: Only Manchester United’s Premier League games have seen more goals (91) than Bournemouth’s this season (90, level with Burnley). Despite this, no side has had more 0-0 draws than the Cherries this term (4).

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26 - EP 15
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Manon Fiorot vs. Mellony Guegjes
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the TF2 women's flyweight finale between Manon Fiorot and Mellony Guegjes. Bonus coverage includes Adrian Sanchez vs. Serge Kasanda.

programme.title: WCCB Otto Wallin vs. Gianluca Mandras
programme.desc: Italian champ Gianluca Mandras (12-4, 5 KOs) battles 26-year-old Swedish southpaw Otto Wallin (17-0, 11 KOs) for the WBA Continental Heavyweight Championship in Wallin's hometown of Sundsvall in the city's premiere professional boxing event. Wallin expects to seize the title, while Mandras plans to spoil Wallin's homecoming celebration at the Sporthallen arena.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Deandre Latimore vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: This episode features Carlos Quintana's penultimate bout, as he fights Deandre Latimore, in a light middleweight title contest, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams (II)
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the second encounter between middleweights Paul Williams and Sergio Martinez. This time around, championship gold is on the line in a bout that will not go the distance. Also on the card, Marcos Maidana tries to jump up a weight class.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Endo, Okinoumi, Takarafuji and Shimanoumi from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Weapons Championship as well as Boys Forms, Synchronized Team Weapons and a World Record Break.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features Michael Bisping as he talks about his fame, Dominick Cruz in the announcer's booth and Tito Ortiz shows off his house.

programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the TF2 women's flyweight finale between Manon Fiorot and Mellony Guegjes. Bonus coverage includes Adrian Sanchez vs. Serge Kasanda.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Timothy Bradley vs. Devon Alexander
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a battle of unbeaten junior welterweights to unify the WBC and WBO world titles as Timothy Bradley, aka 'Desert Storm', (26-0, 11 KOs) faces Devon Alexander 'The Great' (21-1, 13 KOs). This fight took place at the Silverdome in Pontiac, Michigan, USA on January 29, 2011.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 6: Bandung, Indonesia - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Pencak Silat and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet, Throws and Weapons featuring Masters Rita Suwanda and Dadang Gunawan.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a welterweight world championship contest featuring Arturo Gatti and Carlos Baldomir. Baldomir looks to continue his rise in the welterweight ranks. Also on the card, a classic welterweight title brawl between Andre Berto and Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 featuring Shodai, Aoiyama, Takagenji and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights James Kirkland vs. Alfredo Angulo
programme.desc: This episode features James Kirkland as he faces Alfredo Angulo in an explosive, hard-hitting fight, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters

programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.desc: All of the Teletubbies are stuck. Tinky Winky's hand is stuck in the bag, Dipsy's hat is stuck, Laa-Laa's ball is stuck and Po is stuck on the Tubby Slidey!

programme.desc: Messy monster can't work out why his cart won't move. The wheels just won't go round like normal. Off he goes to OKIDO to find out why.

programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy monster is just about to take a bite out of his delicious green sock for breakfast, but before he can it gets blown away! He goes to OKIDO to find out why the wind is so blowy.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Gran Gran and JoJo are excited to bake a batch of Great Gran Gran's signature Saint Lucian banana bread, but there's a problem - they don't know how long to bake it for!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 13

Tiny Flea tells Lion that if he dares to enter the Great Cave of Tinga Tinga then maybe he will find his roar. Lion plucks up courage and goes into the Great Cave. He roars with all his might, but a bigger roar comes back! Lion stands strong. He roars again and an even bigger roar comes back.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 24

programme.desc: The Beans Scouts and the Squirrel Scouts go skiing, and Lazlo and Lumpus discover that the mountain isn't big enough for the both of them.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2 - EP 18
programme.desc: Skip and Chip have a big fight, and it's up to Lazlo to get them back together again.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2 - EP 19
programme.desc: All the campers vie to become Camp Kidney's newest mascot; unfortunately, there can be only one winner.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2 - EP 20
programme.desc: Edward 'earns' enough badges to become the first camper ever to graduate from Camp Kidney--but does he want to go?

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2 - EP 21
programme.desc: Edward gets bit by a wood gnome, and he discovers that this is no little mosquito bite!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2 - EP 22
programme.desc: Raj and Smason fight over a secret hotsprings only to end up shriveled raisins from soaking in it too long.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2 - EP 24
programme.desc: Miss Mucous volunteers to help the Bean Scouts pass their fitness test, but secretly she's out to destroy Camp Kidney.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2 - EP 25
programme.desc: Camp Kidney puts on a informative play about the seven types of poisonous sandwhiches, but unfortunately there can be only one starring role.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Lazlo gets a new best friend. It's not another camper but a parasitic leech that is stuck to his head!

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Follow the minion trio as they venture out into the world to find a new evil boss for their brethren to follow.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: This star-packed extravaganza brings the comic book legend to the big screen where an infant superhero is sent to Earth just as his home planet, Krypton, explodes.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 1
programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition's fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! A mise-en-place challenge set at the historic Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles kicks off the intense battle, where the Chefs immediately size each other up to see how everyone has progressed since last competing. Then, the first elimination challenge takes the Chefs to the beach to cook a seafood meal - however, their only heat source will be fire. No electricity, no special appliances.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 2
programme.desc: This week the chefs honor the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. Using Gold's last guide list, the chefs fan out all over Los Angeles to sample the unique taquerias, food trucks, mom-and-pop cafes, upscale eateries and ethnic cuisine only found in the City of Angels. Drawing inspiration from this one-in-a-lifetime culinary odyssey, the chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold's friends, family, and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 3
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration from one of four historical art movements to create a masterpiece on their plate. Guest Judge Ludo Lefebvre joins Tom, Padma and Gail, as well as guest diners Chefs Ray Garcia, Sara Hymanson, Sarah Kramer and Craig Thornton.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: The most loveable criminal mastermind and his army of incomprehensible, yet adorable, yellow minions are back for a fourth instalment filled with outrageous adventures and family shenanigans.

programme.title: Craig Before The Creek
programme.desc: The epic finale of the quest for the Heart of the Forest.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts And Where To Find Them
programme.desc: A Magizoologist arrives in New York amid tensions in the wizarding world only to be branded as a fugitive as he tries to recover his missing beasts.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Rex and co. must rescue Providence agents who are trapped in a savage secluded evo hotspot.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Noah convinces Rex to be his wingman on prom night, but Rex must split his time fighting an evo.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Providence encounters a street gang of teenage evos and are shocked to discover that Rex was once a member!

programme.title: Generator Rex S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: The evil computer ZAG RS returns to take control of all nanites in this nail-biting outer space adventure!

programme.title: Generator Rex S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Pack is feverishly trying to resurrect Van Kleiss, but they need Rex's help, or the world will succumb to a deadly nanite invasion!

programme.title: Generator Rex S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Tiny, metal-munching evo wasps are destroying everything, and Rex and co must stop them.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: After a round of smack-talking, Rex agrees to go through Providence boot camp and drags Noah along for the ride.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Rex is 15, and like most 15-year-old boys, he likes cars, girls, music and sports. But unlike most 15-year-old boys, he can make his fists the size of boulders.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: In this flashback story, we see how Rex became a part of Providence.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Van Kleiss and his Pack take over the Keep and invade Providence HQ!

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: 12 young chefs enter the Top Chef Junior kitchen to kick off the second season.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Most of the chefs are very familiar with the main ingredient for this Quickfire Challenge: instant ramen! But Host Vanessa Lachey and Guest Judge Sheldon Simeon aren't looking for the 5-minute version. Instead, the chefs have access to all the ingredients in the Top Chef Junior pantry to put their own spin on this popular dish.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: It's all fun and games when the chefs must play the classic arcade game "Alley Roller" in their Quickfire Challenge in order to earn prizes & pizza ingredients to impress Actress & Guest Judge, Busy Phillips. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs must turn 5 ingredients kids typically avoid into delicious dishes! The chefs work in teams and battle it out head-to head in this 5 round cook-off for a special group of young judges.

programme.desc: At the grocery store, Rodney feeds Andy some food samples that Andy is allergic to, causing him to bloat up like a giant ball.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 2

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 3

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 4

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 5

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 8

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 15
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J get stuck in a lifeboat together. 'Nuff said.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 16
programme.desc: Butch, the bully squirrel from the park, takes up residence in the Johnson house.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 17
programme.desc: Perplexed by Martha's strange behavior, Rodney and Andy stow away on the ice cream truck of the all-knowing Sludgy Dave hoping to learn from his sage like ways.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 18
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney go to the neighbor's to complain about the Crazy Dog.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 19
programme.desc: Rodney discovers he's impervious to blame and goes into business as The Blametaker!

They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won't save them from being sent home.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, "CNBC Meets" is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime rpt - EP 11
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money rpt - EP 11
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Channel Japan - EP 44
programme.desc: Channel Japan offers a fresh look at the latest in the economy, business, technology, culture and sightseeing of Japan.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: "American Greed" goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Sports - PGA TOUR
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest PGA TOUR tournament.

programme.title: CNBC Sports - WDSC World Downhill Skateboarding Championship
programme.desc: The WDSC is the world-leading international series for the spectacular sporting disciplines of Downhill Skateboarding and Street Luge in their purest forms.

programme.title: CNBC Sports - WDSC World Downhill Skateboarding Championship
programme.desc: The WDSC is the world-leading international series for the spectacular sporting disciplines of Downhill Skateboarding and Street Luge in their purest forms.

programme.title: Santos Tour Down Under
programme.desc: The Santos Tour Down Under is Australia's greatest cycling race, with a rich history as the highest-regarded and most popular bike race in the southern hemisphere.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Jason Kelly follows Pierre Gasly from Alpine Headquarters to a Paris photo shoot to get a firsthand look at how the business of being an F1 driver goes far beyond the track.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Jason Kelly heads to Maranello, Italy, to speak with Ferrari's leadership about the coming regulatory changes for Formula 1 and how Ferrari's racing technology informs the road cars of today.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Miami Grand Prix Managing Partner Tom Garfinkel tackles the complexities of putting on the race, and F1 CEO Stefano Domenicali reveals why it's key to F1's future growth.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to explore how it became a cultural and tech superpower. She trains with a Taekwondo blackbelt, learns kimchi secrets from a grandmaster and dives into pro gaming.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas. She decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys to Ireland, her ancestral homeland, tracing the impact of the nation's modern economic transformation and its connections to the land and sea.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals how Iceland's geological extremes help shape its culture. She meets scientists predicting lava flows and harnessing geothermal power, and even rides along ancient Viking trails.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Hannah explores Vietnam. From the vibrancy of Ho Chi Minh City to a muddy prawn harvest in the Mekong Delta and the misty hilltops of Sapa, she reveals a nation embracing change.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Spain to decode its history and culture. She learns about the rhythms of flamenco, a mountain whistle language and the hidden symbolism in its urban planning.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Americas Now
programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America. The strength of the program is its storytelling. Correspondents across the region present insightful, well-researched and engaging narratives. Americas Now is a compelling, authoritative and balanced voice from the region, giving CGTN a competitive edge in the North American media market.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

Big Story aims to present the contemporary world and China’s global perspectives on the contemporary world to an international audience.

programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Zoom In
programme.desc: A TV news magazine show packed with top stories from around the world. The weekly program zooms in on the details of trending news items and zooms out to give viewers the bigger picture. With in-depth analysis and current perspective, Zoom In takes you on a journey beyond the daily headlines.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and "accepted wisdom" to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, the Agenda quite simply sets the agenda. You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling. The program provides a unique platform for the best current affairs documentaries from around the globe. Big Story aims to present the contemporary world and China’s global perspectives on the contemporary world to an international audience.

programme.title: The World Today

The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world._x000D__x000D__x000D_

They also receive an unexpected proposal from Ando Morinari (Tanaka Tetsushi), a senior retainer of the Saito clan.
